tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 RC=0; printed 'Phase 1 architecture planning started'.

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: jq '.phase1_architecture.steps_completed' returns array.

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 steps (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed RC=0.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh RC=0; reports 'Phase gates consistent.'

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After phase1 steps + gate pass, .current_phase remains 0. No script advances current_phase. U-D from prior sweep is still open — recorded as Medium-severity confirmation.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps and running check-phase-gate.sh (RC=0), inspect .claude/phase-state.json — .current_phase is still 0.
framework_bugs.expected: current_phase advances from 0 to 1 (or to 2 after construction) when phase gate passes and approval is logged.
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase remains 0; no documented script auto-advances the phase counter. Builders Guide describes the gate behavior but no implementing script exists.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: After --start-feature uat-feat-1, jq '.build_loop.feature' = 'uat-feat-1'.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written..documentation_updated) succeeded sequentially with stub artifacts present.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' RC=0 with all 5 steps complete and security audit findings stub at docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded RC=0 (commit f02d321). Bypassing the PreToolUse path lets the commit through. U-C from prior sweep — still open. Recorded as Medium confirmation.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 and feature_recorded step, started uat-feat-2, completed all 5 steps, committed feat(uat-2) successfully RC=0; gate did not block. PR #17 grace-window reset confirmed working.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid CDF 4.2.3 schema; piped PreToolUse-shaped JSON payload to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh, which returned permissionDecision='deny' with 'pre-commit gate: commit blocked — pending user decision' message. Note: direct shell `git commit` bypasses PreToolUse (same U-C root cause), but the gate itself correctly blocks when invoked via the documented hook path.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve A1 RC=0; sentinel file removed; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation no longer denies.

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq '.features_completed' .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' and 'uat-feat-2'.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006 gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: Without --start-feature, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'`. Commit succeeds RC=0.
framework_bugs.expected: Either pre-commit-gate is wired as a git commit-msg hook so it fires for direct shell commits, or builders-guide documents the limitation clearly.
framework_bugs.actual: BL-006 enforcement is only via PreToolUse hook (Claude-only path). Direct shell commits bypass the gate entirely. No git commit-msg hook installed.

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-010 / U-C: builders-guide should explicitly document that BL-006 enforcement is PreToolUse-only and direct shell git commits are not gated; recommend installing a commit-msg hook for shell-driven workflows.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: Phase 4 is correctly blocked for private_poc deployment. process-checklist.sh --start-phase4 RC=1 with message: 'Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in private poc mode. POC projects complete at Phase 3. To unlock Phase 4: bash scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production'. This is the documented gating behavior for private_poc — N/A for Phase 4 production release tests until project is upgraded. Recording as PASS for documented gating rather than the production-path tests, which do not apply to this scenario.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A for private_poc — Phase 4 gated until upgrade-to-production; documented and expected. No bug.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git grep for literal-value secret patterns (password|api[_-]?key|secret|token followed by '=' or ':' and a 16+ char literal) returned 0 hits. Matches in committed files (CI workflows, templates, scripts) reference secret-name placeholders, not values.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log not present (no FORCE/reset events occurred during run, which is the correct append-only behavior).

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $PROJECT_DIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned no files.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches captured SHA exactly). git status --short shows only the pre-existing untracked .claude/ dir and the Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ sweep results dir — no tracked changes, no edits to framework files. Framework-self guard from PR #18 held.

summary: private_poc/mobile/light base agent: init --non-interactive, Phase 1, Phase 2 build loops (incl. BL-006 grace-window reset and BL-015 sentinel block+resolve via the documented hook path), and Phase 3 (incl. UAT lint) all green. Phase 4 correctly gated for private_poc. Confirmed two known-open Medium bugs (U-C: shell git commit bypasses BL-006; U-D: no script advances current_phase). PR #17 helpers (pending-approval, lint-uat-scenarios) and PR #18 framework-self guard verified. No framework contamination.
